name: AI Speech Writing Tools
description: AI-powered writing assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Jasper) that help draft, structure, and refine political speeches — from initial brainstorming through to final polish. Used as a starting point, not a replacement for authentic voice.
whyUseIt: Speech writing is time-consuming. AI tools can generate first drafts, suggest rhetorical structures, identify weak arguments, and help with research — dramatically reducing the time from idea to polished speech. The politician's authentic voice and judgement must always be the final filter.
aiCapabilities: Full speech drafting, rhetorical analysis, argument strengthening, tone adjustment, fact-checking assistance, translation for multilingual electorates
funnelPosition: Mid funnel — content creation for persuasion
marketerWorkflow: Brief the AI with context (audience, occasion, key messages, tone), generate a draft, review and inject authentic personal stories and local references, rehearse and refine
managerExpects: Faster speech turnaround — from days to hours for routine speeches, with the politician's voice and values consistently reflected
demoDescription: Use Claude to draft a 5-minute community forum speech on local healthcare, then manually inject personal stories and local references to make it authentic

vocabulary.definition: The skill of crafting instructions for AI tools to produce the most useful output
Ensuring AI-assisted content sounds like the politician, not like a robot

beginnerMistakes: Using AI-generated speeches without personalisation — audiences detect inauthenticity
Letting AI write policy positions it might hallucinate — always fact-check claims
